description: Inner Animal Media — Cache Reserve + static asset caching (managed by scripts/cloudflare/install-cache-reserve.sh)

rules.description: IAM Cache Reserve: bypass dynamic API, dashboard shell, MCP, SW
rules.expression: (starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/api/")) or (starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/dashboard")) or (http.request.uri.path eq "/sw.js") or (http.request.uri.path eq "/push-handler.js") or (http.request.uri.path eq "/sw-agent-cache.js") or (starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/mcp")) or (http.host eq "mcp.inneranimalmedia.com") or (http.host eq "autorag.inneranimalmedia.com")

rules.description: IAM Cache Reserve: dashboard hashed static (R2)
IAM Cache Reserve: public CMS + marketing pages
IAM Cache Reserve: assets host (themes, GLBs, learn)
IAM Cache Reserve: default static extensions (baseline)
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.path.extension in {"7z" "avi" "avif" "apk" "bin" "bmp" "bz2" "class" "css" "csv" "doc" "docx" "dmg" "ejs" "eot" "eps" "exe" "flac" "gif" "gz" "ico" "iso" "jpeg" "jpg" "js" "mid" "midi" "mkv" "mp3" "ogg" "otf" "pdf" "pict" "pls" "png" "ppt" "pptx" "ps" "rar" "svg" "svgz" "swf" "tar" "tif" "tiff" "ttf" "webm" "webp" "woff" "woff2" "xls" "xlsx" "zip" "glb" "gltf" "wasm" "map" "webmanifest"}) and not starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/api/") and not starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/dashboard")

rules.description: IAM MP4 Safari: respect strong ETags (must run before MP4 bypass)
IAM MP4 Safari: bypass cache for range requests
